rulings.Case Title: KELKRIS ASSOCIATES, INC. DBA CREDIT BUREAU VS. CHERYL A EDISON et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 13, 2009, line 4, CROSS-DEFENDANTS KATHERINE ROBERTS AND ROBERTS MANAGEMENT'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. CROSS-COMPLAINT IS VAGUE AND UNCERTAIN AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MUST IDENTIFY WHICH CROSS-DEFENDANT WAS THE LANDLORD OR LESSOR OF THE PROPERTY, DESIGNATE WHICH CAUSES OF ACTION RELATE TO WHICH CROSS-DEFENDANT, AND SPECIFY FACTS THAT SUPPORT EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST THOSE CROSS-DEFENDANTS. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MAY NOT SUPPORT HER CLAIMS WITH CONCLUSORY ALLEGATIONS. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: SAYED BASHIR RAHIMI VS. TAXI COMMISSION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Reconsideration Of Ruling His Ex Parte Application For Order For Stay Medallion
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 13, 2009, line 10, PETITIONER SAYED RAHIMI'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Ruling His Ex Parte Application For Order For Stay Medallion. MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION DENIED. PETITIONER HAS NOT ALLEGED NEW LAW OR FACTS THAT WERE NOT AVAILABLE AT THE TIME THE ORIGINAL OR SUBSEQUENT APPLICATIONS WERE MADE. THIGPEN IS NEITHER A PROSECUTOR NOR A HEARING OFFICER. NO VIOLATION OF THE APA. =(302/CWW/AY)
